case_title: HARRISON, DOROTHY VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARRISON, DOROTHY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS $647.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $662.00, DEFT WAIVED ANY DEFECTS IN SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
